creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 198697
v1

Hi there

kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run of merging the two ports into one.
There is no real reason for us to split them, so don't.

The patch is attached, and can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/qt5-declarative.v1.diff


Thanks, and mfg
Tobias
